prompt:
STYLE: editorial-cool premium product hero, 1:1 square, 4K. Split-layout composition with light informational content. Cinematic magazine-ad energy.

COMPOSITION: vertical SPLIT-LAYOUT. LEFT HALF is a solid MUTED TEAL/CYAN color-block (matching brand teal). RIGHT HALF is a real-photo lifestyle scene: sun-warmed light-oak wood surface with a small bunch of fresh sea moss fronds, a sliced burdock root, a few dandelion flowers and leaves arranged loosely (photoreal 3D-rendered ingredients).

The Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold accents, label fully legible, gold lid, jar closed) sits at the CENTER, straddling the split. SHARP CLEAN SPECULAR HIGHLIGHT runs down the jar's curved glossy black plastic. Beside the jar on the wood side, a small ceramic dish holds 4-5 dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES.

LIGHTING: clean bright directional light wrapping the jar uniformly. Teal block has subtle gradient/haze; lifestyle side has natural daylight. Cohesive scene.

TEXT — restrained but informative. On the LEFT (teal) half of the frame:
  • Small bold ALL-CAPS condensed-display HEADER at the top in clean white: 'MsB° BLEND'
  • Below the header, a thin gold horizontal rule.
  • Below the rule, FOUR small chevron-shaped callout strips stacked vertically (matching the jar's actual side panel infographic style). Each strip contains:
      – a tiny flat white icon
      – a bold ALL-CAPS single-line LABEL in clean white
      – a tiny single-line gray-white sub-caption (3-5 words max)
    The four strips:
      MINERAL SOURCE — '92 essential minerals'
      HERBAL EXTRACTS — 'Traditional botanicals'
      MAGNESIUM SUPPORT — 'For daily vitality'
      PLANT BASED — 'Vegan & non-GMO'
  • At the bottom-left, a thin gold horizontal rule, then a tiny single-line tag: '60 GUMMIES  ·  30-DAY SUPPLY'.
Nothing else. NO additional headline, NO bottom strip beyond the tag.

DESIGN: editorial split-layout teal color-block + warm wood lifestyle · jar straddling both worlds · clean white side-panel labels with gold rules · tiny sub-captions add a layer of info without crowding · NO graphic-design noise.

RULES: all text cleanly spelled · 1:1 4K · split layout (NOT flat white, NOT only lifestyle) · no border/frame · text limited to: 'MsB° BLEND' header + 4 chevron strips (label + 3-5 word sub-caption each) + 1-line supply tag.
